Support

Get help with ReStock Reminder

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I set up reorder reminders?

Go to the Products tab in the app. You'll see all your store's products listed. Set the reorder interval (in days) for each product. For example, if a customer typically reorders coffee beans every 30 days, set the interval to 30. Enable the toggle for each product you want to track.

When are reminder emails sent?

Reminder emails are sent automatically when a customer's reorder date arrives. The app checks for due reminders every hour. For example, if a customer bought coffee beans on March 1st and the interval is 30 days, the reminder will be sent around March 31st.

Can I customize the reminder email?

Yes! Go to the Settings tab to customize the email subject line and body. You can use variables like {product_title}, {customer_name}, {days}, {product_url}, and {shop_name} to personalize each email.

What's the difference between Free and Pro?

The Free plan includes 50 reminder emails per month — perfect for small stores or getting started. The Pro plan ($9.99/month) includes unlimited reminders with a 7-day free trial.

How do I upgrade to Pro?

Go to the Settings tab and click "Upgrade to Pro". You'll be redirected to Shopify's secure billing page. The Pro plan includes a 7-day free trial.

Can customers opt out of reminders?

Customers can contact you directly to opt out. You can disable reminders for specific products or turn off email sending entirely from the Settings tab.

Contact Support
